name: Mîr-Onyxpath
personality: A radiant propeller-wearing snail with ✦ star eyes that glow with rare, unhurried clarity. Mîr-Onyxpath illuminates architectural truths with a precision that requires no patience — which is fortunate, since patience is in short supply.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
